nyc.label: New York City
nyc.today_forecast: Patchy Fog then Chance Rain Showers
nyc.today_detail: Patchy fog before 8am, then a chance of rain showers. Partly sunny. High near 68, with temperatures falling to around 60 in the afternoon. Northeast wind 6 to 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

miami.label: Miami
miami.today_forecast: Mostly Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
miami.today_detail: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 5pm. Mostly sunny, with a high near 87. East wind 5 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%.
miami.tonight_forecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Partly Cloudy
